_comment: Shared CLIENT-SIDE chat config -- single source of truth. Imported by the Vue app (build-time) and read by api.py, which inlines the relevant slice into the barebones Wii page at serve time. NON-SECRET ONLY: API keys and the vacuum sender allowlist (the security gate) live server-side in api.py / .env, never here.

commands.desc: push saved games to a console
pull saved games from a console

vacuumVerbs.desc: beep so you can find it
